channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Israeli Court Upholds Detention of Two Gaza-Bound Flotilla Activists
item.description: An Israeli court on Wednesday refused an appeal against the detention of two foreign activists, Saif Abu Keshek, a Spanish national of Palestinian origin, and Brazilian Thiago Avila, who were captured...

item.title: Meghan Markle shares a previously unseen photo of baby Archie resting on Prince Harry
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex, Meghan Markle, recently shared a previously unseen photograph of her son, Archie, during his infancy. The image, showing the baby peacefully asleep on Prince Harry's chest, offe...

item.title: Profile of Celestine 'Wakavinye' Ndinda following separation from Njugush
item.description: Celestine 'Wakavinye' Ndinda is a well-known Kenyan digital content creator and entrepreneur, recognised for her authentic personality and inspiring life story. Born on December 3, 1992, in Mathare, N...

item.title: Francois Janse van Rensburg embarks on 1 500km trek to support Somerset West Family Shelter
item.description: Francois Janse van Rensburg, a 63-year-old resident of Somerset West, has set out on an ambitious 1 500km walk from Windhoek, Namibia, to Somerset West. His campaign, titled 'Walk the Talk', began on ...

item.title: Methodist Church Nigeria Calls for Security, Affordable Living, and Fair Elections
item.description: The Methodist Church Nigeria, Diocese of Wesley, don raise alarm over di wahala wey Nigerians dey face now, especially high cost of living and insecurity. During their first synod for Cathedral of Gra...

item.title: Federal Judge Unseals Jeffrey Epstein's Alleged Suicide Note
item.description: A federal judge in White Plains, New York, has unsealed a note purportedly written by Jeffrey Epstein, the notorious financier who faced charges of sexually trafficking minors and later died in jail. ...

item.title: Delhi Declaration to Strengthen Global Big Cat Conservation at IBCA Summit 2026
item.description: Union Environment Minister Bhupender Yadav announced that the upcoming Global Big Cat Summit, organised by the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) on June 1–2, 2026, will adopt the Delhi Declaration...

item.title: Dina Bonnevie Praises Fyang Smith's Talent Despite Her Playful Nature
item.description: Veteran actress Dina Bonnevie recently shared her thoughts on young actress Fyang Smith, highlighting both her energetic personality and her acting skills. In an interview, Bonnevie described Fyang as...

item.title: Frozen Meals Adapt to Weight Loss Drug Trends in the US
item.description: Frozen TV dinners, a staple of American convenience food for over 70 years, are being reimagined in response to the growing use of GLP-1 medications for weight loss. Nearly one in five American adults...

item.title: Scottish family delayed abroad due to new UK dual nationality travel requirements for infants
item.description: A Scottish mother, Sarah Schloegl, has been left stranded abroad after her 11-month-old baby was denied boarding on a Ryanair flight from Alicante due to new UK rules affecting dual nationals. Schloeg...

item.title: NSCDC Arrests 210 Suspects, Recovers ₦23 Million and Resolves Over 1,700 Disputes in Ogun
item.description: For the past one year and six months, the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC) Ogun State Command don dey very active against vandalism, fraud, and illegal mining. During a visit to the Ni...

item.title: 19-Year-Old Kentucky Man Pleads Guilty but Mentally Ill in Grandmother's Death
item.description: Wyatt Testerman, a 19-year-old from Kentucky, pleaded guilty but mentally ill to murdering his 74-year-old grandmother, Cheri Oliver, in an unprovoked attack at her home in October 2024. Prosecutors s...

item.title: Outgoing Chief Ministers Review Election Outcomes and Plan Next Steps
item.description: On Wednesday, the outgoing chief ministers of West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, and Kerala — Mamata Banerjee, MK Stalin, and Pinarayi Vijayan — spent the day assessing their recent electoral defeats. Mamata Ba...

item.title: Man charged with murdering partner and causing explosion in London home
item.description: A court in London has heard that Clifton George, 45, fatally stabbed his partner, Annabel Rook, 46, during an argument at their Stoke Newington home on 17 June 2025. George admits to manslaughter but ...

item.title: Revisiting Vishwanath Singh Bahadur and the queer subtext of Ackerley’s ‘Hindoo Holiday’
item.description: The article examines the relatively obscure figure of Vishwanath Singh Bahadur, the ruler of the princely state of Chhatarpur, through the lens of queer literary history. Though not widely remembered ...

item.title: Debate over Legal Sector Code intensifies as law firms and BBC clash on transformation
item.description: The Black Business Council (BBC) has voiced strong support for the Legal Sector Code of Good Practice (LSC), defending it against legal challenges from several major corporate law firms in South Afric...

item.title: Jewish Australians share personal experiences at antisemitism royal commission
item.description: During the royal commission into antisemitism and social cohesion, Dina, an Australian Jew, shared a profoundly personal account that resonated deeply within the Sydney Jewish community. Her youngest ...

item.title: Fisherman killed in Homa Bay clash linked to disputes over shrinking fishing grounds
item.description: A tragic incident was reported in Homa Bay County after a violent clash between rival groups of fishermen at Mukuyu Beach in Suba sub-county led to the death of a 35-year-old fisherman, Fredrick Oduol...

item.title: Government continues suspension of TV news TRP ratings amid West Asia conflict concerns
item.description: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting (MIB) has once again extended the suspension of television rating points (TRPs) for news channels, directing the Broadcast Audience Research Council (BARC)...

item.title: Influencer Rogan O’Handley declines involvement in Trump UFO files release
item.description: Rogan O’Handley, a MAGA-aligned social media personality known as DC Draino, has announced that he will not participate in the release of forthcoming 'UFO Files'. O’Handley expressed regret over his e...
